signals.title: USD/JPY — Geopolitical + Carry
signals.text: Japan FinMin Katayama warns of decisive action on speculation; 300bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains USD/JPY bid at 159.82. Intervention risk on a break above 160.00; JPY COT LF short −65,309. Carry dominates until VIX > 25.

signals.title: AUD/USD — Positioning + Vol
signals.text: AUD/USD COT LF net long +41,675 vs HV30 at 8.2% and ATM IV at 9.4%. 25d RR at −0.14; mild put skew despite bullish price trend — market hedging rather than chasing. Late-trend caution signal; CFTC LF delta turning positive would invalidate the caution read.

signals.title: EUR/USD — G8 Bilateral Theme + Carry
signals.text: EUR leads G8 laggards (EUR −0.485% vs USD +0.515%, 7 pairs each; G8 spread: 1.000%). Fed 3.75% vs ECB 2% — 175bp carry advantage drives the divergence; EUR/USD at 1.168.

signals.title: GBP/USD — Positioning + Carry
signals.text: GBP/USD at 1.3457 — BoE 3.75% vs Fed 3.75% yields 0bp carry neutral. COT LF net long +28,426; AM not reducing; positioning aligned with carry. 25d RR flat; volatility neutral. Watch 1.3600 as next resistance if carry stays supportive.
